MANOSABA-QUICK_WIT_POWER.title: Quick Wit
MANOSABA-QUICK_WIT_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, randomly gain: 1-3 Strength, -2~2 Dexterity, -10~+10 HP, 0-2 Vulnerable to all enemies, and 0-2 Weak to all enemies.
MANOSABA-QUICK_WIT_POWER.smartDescriptio: At the start of each turn, gain random Strength/Dex/HP and give all enemies Vulnerable and Weak.
MANOSABA-HANGING_KILL_POWER.title: Hanging Kill
MANOSABA-HANGING_KILL_POWER.description: Hanging Kill cards deal multiplied damage to this creature.
MANOSABA-HANGING_KILL_POWER.smartDescrip: Hanging Kill cards deal multiplied damage to this creature.
MANOSABA-LIFELONG_FRIEND_POWER.title: Lifelong Friend
MANOSABA-LIFELONG_FRIEND_POWER.descripti:
At the start of your turn, lose 20 Majoka and gain a 0-cost Boulders.
If your linked partner dies, you immediately die.
MANOSABA-LIFELONG_FRIEND_POWER.smartDesc: Lose 20 Majoka and gain a 0-cost Boulders each turn; die if partner dies.
MANOSABA-DATE_TIME_NO_MAJOKA_POWER.title: Date Time
MANOSABA-DATE_TIME_NO_MAJOKA_POWER.descr: You cannot gain Majoka this turn.
MANOSABA-DATE_TIME_NO_MAJOKA_POWER.smart: You cannot gain Majoka this turn.
